title: shalat #7980
definition:
1) to domineer, exercise power over, dominate, have mastery, be
    master, lord it over
    1a) (Qal) to domineer, lord it over, become master
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to give power of
        1b2) to get mastery of
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to domineer, exercise power over, dominate, have mastery, be
    master, lord it over
    1a) (Qal) to domineer, lord it over, become master
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to give power of
        1b2) to get mastery of

    NASB:  to domineer, be master of
